projectDescription: Clamly is an all-in-one study platform for students that combines AI-powered quizzes, spaced-repetition flashcards, an AI chat assistant, notes, a focus timer, study groups, and exam scheduling in a single web app.
keyFeatures: AI quiz generation from PDFs and documents
Clamly Chat — AI study assistant with Adaptive, Tutor, Buddy, and Professor modes
Spaced repetition flashcards using the SM-2 algorithm
Markdown notes with full-screen editor, pinning, and color-coding
Global Pomodoro focus timer that persists across pages
Task management with priorities, due dates, and drag-and-drop
Exam calendar with two-way Google Calendar sync
Study groups with invite codes, shared quizzes, and role management
Achievement system with streaks, scores, and progress stats
Free tier with Starter ($4.99/mo) and Pro ($9.99/mo) paid plans
publicApiSurface: File upload (PDF, Word, plain text) for AI processing
